name: Patient Case
history: Works in an educational setting with children who have learning disabilities. Describes being pampered by parents and having minimal consequences earlier in life. Ongoing conflicts with authority figures.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't meet expectations, I will be seen as a failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not capable of making a difference.
coping_strategies: Avoids confrontation and may not assert needs or boundaries.
situation: Encouraging students to socialize and participate in campus activities, with results falling short of expectations.
auto_thought: I am not effective in helping my students.
behavior: Attempts to motivate students but feels discouraged when outcomes are not as expected.
